results.title: Global music superstar set to perform during AFL Grand Final week
results.description: Australian global music superstar Dom Dolla is set to perform during Grand Final as part of a special concert at Marvel Stadium. 3AW Drive host Jacqui Felgate revealed the exclusive details. Press PLAY to listen to the FULL details Image: Getty/Josh Chadwick/AFL Photos/via Getty Images
results.source: 3aw - Melbourne's Favourite News And Talk Station
